titleStmt.title: SII 22.83: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 83. (A.R. No. 83 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJ. VĪRARĀJĒNDRA—3rd YEAR (A.D. 1065-66)

summary.p: This begins with a short introduction commencing with the words Vīramē tuṇaiyāgavum. It records a gift of 10 kāśu for burning a lamp during the three services in the temple of Tāntōṉṟiuḍaiya-Mahādēva by Tirumukkaṉ alias Nambiyārūraṉ of Kommaipākkam a merchant of Vīrarājēndrapuram in Vīrarājēndra-vaḷanāḍu. The amount is said to have been deposited with the Tiruvuṇṇāḻigai-sabhā of the temple. The writing is engraved in a careless manner.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . viramey tuṇaiyāka tiyāka
me yaṇiyāka ceṅkolocci karuṅkali kaṭintu
veṇkuṭainiḻal vijaiyasiṅhāsaṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovi
rājakecarivaṉmar[āna Uṭaiyār śrī virarācentira]devaṟ ku yāṇṭu 3- Āvatu
virarājentravaḷanāṭṭup peṇṇai vaṭakarai vi[ rarācentra]
purattu viyāpāri kommaipākkamuṭaiyāṉ tirumukka
ṉ Āṉa nampiyārūran tiruttāṉṟoṉṟi Uṭaiya mahādevark
ku vaitta santi viḷakku Oṉṟukkum tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sa
bhaiyom vacam tan=ta kācu pattu Ikkācu pattukku muṉṟu sa
[ndhiyu] muṭṭāmai Oru viḷakku Erippatāṉom tiruvuṇṇāḻi
kai sabhaiyom can=tirātittaval Itu panmāheśva[ rarakṣai] .
Digital edition of SII 22.83 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
